channel.title: sipi.bot
channel.description: The Spend Firewall for AI Agents

item.title: sipi.bot — The Spend Firewall for AI Agents
item.description: sipi.bot is a spend firewall for autonomous AI agents: one API call returns APPROVED, BLOCKED, or FLAGGED against your caps, velocity, and merchant rules before an agent spends. Not a SIP/VoIP telephony bot.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: The Spend Firewall for AI Agents: A Complete Guide (2026)
item.description: The complete guide to AI agent spend control: what a spend firewall is, the 6 rule types every autonomous agent needs, how it differs from LLM budgets and observability tools, and how to deploy one in 5 lines of code. By sipi.bot.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: Runaway AI Agent Incident Frequency (2026 Benchmark)
item.description: How often do autonomous AI agents runaway and overspend? Our benchmark of 312 production agent teams: 67% reported at least one runaway incident in 90 days, median cost $340, top decile over $5,000. Full methodology and breakdowns.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: How to Prevent Runaway AI Costs (2026 Guide) — sipi.bot
item.description: Runaway AI agent costs happen when a retry loop or unattended session spends before you notice. The fix is a pre-spend firewall: per-transaction caps, velocity limits, and merchant allowlists that block the spend before it fires. Step-by-step.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: sipi.bot vs LiteLLM: which is right for you?
item.description: An honest comparison of sipi.bot and LiteLLM. Pricing, strengths, weaknesses, and when to pick each.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: sipi.bot vs Helicone: which is right for you?
item.description: An honest comparison of sipi.bot and Helicone. Pricing, strengths, weaknesses, and when to pick each.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: Can an AI Agent Spend Money Without Permission?
item.description: Yes — if your AI agent has access to a payment method and no pre-spend guardrail, it can spend money without per-transaction approval. Here is how it happens and how to stop it.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: What is Spend firewall? sipi.bot glossary
item.description: A spend firewall is a policy layer that approves or rejects each spend intent from an autonomous AI agent before the transaction executes.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: AI agent framework integrations — sipi.bot
item.description: Add a spend firewall to LangChain, CrewAI, OpenAI Agents SDK, or Vercel AI SDK. One call approves, blocks, or flags every agent purchase.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: /best
item.description: The Spend Firewall for AI Agents
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: Free Tools — sipi.bot
item.description: Free tools for the agent economy: spend risk calculator, live firewall playground. No signup required.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: Open source agent spend firewall — self-host sipi.bot
item.description: Self-host the sipi.bot spend firewall for free. Stdlib Python, zero framework dependencies, 37MB Docker image, MIT licensed. Full policy engine, dashboard, and audit trail on your own infrastructure.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: sipi.bot — Pricing
item.description: Flat $99/month for unlimited transaction evaluations, or $499/month for a managed spend policy. No per-call fees. Free self-hostable core. Rule-integrity guarantee.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot

item.title: sipi.bot Firewall Playground — Try it live, no signup
item.description: Test the sipi.bot spend firewall in your browser right now. Enter a transaction and see APPROVED, BLOCKED, or FLAGGED instantly. No signup, no install.
item.dc:creator: sipi.bot
